name: Toast UI Calendar
when_to_use: 需要视觉完整的月/周/日程表、重叠时段布局和本地日历交互时用它而非手写 CSS grid,因为原生在跨日区间、重叠列布局、滚动时标和视图切换上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能写静态月历表格,做不到周视图的重叠事件分栏、全天/定时事件分层、跨日区间和稳定时区日期运算;Toast UI Calendar 用 events 数组直接补齐这些能力。

data_in.note: events 原样传给 calendar.createEvents;start/end 接 Date|string|number,JSON 输入应优先用带时区的 ISO-8601 字符串。calendarId 引用 options.calendars[].id。

events.id?: string —— 默认可省,需要后续原生 API 定位时应显式提供
events.calendarId?: string —— 默认空字符串;若提供须匹配 options.calendars[].id
events.color?: CSS color string —— 默认日历文字色
events.backgroundColor?: CSS color string —— 默认日历背景色
events.borderColor?: CSS color string —— 默认日历边框色

calendars?.name: string
calendars?.color?: CSS color string —— 默认主题文字色
calendars?.backgroundColor?: CSS color string —— 默认主题背景色
calendars?.borderColor?: CSS color string —— 默认主题边框色

options?.week?: Toast UI 原生 WeekOptions —— 默认上游周视图设置
options?.month?: Toast UI 原生 MonthOptions —— 默认上游月视图设置
options?.theme?: Toast UI 原生 theme 对象 —— 默认内置主题
options?.usageStatistics?: boolean —— boot 强制 false,避免统计脚本

schema.initialDate?: ISO-8601 date/time string —— 默认今天

spec.note: 月/周/日视图的滚动区和事件碰撞布局依赖明确像素高;boot 默认容器 600px,初始化后尺寸变化调用 calendar.render(),铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need visually complete month/week/day schedules, overlapping-time layout, and local calendar interaction instead of a hand-written CSS grid, which tends to fail at multi-day ranges, overlapping columns, scrolling time axes, and view switching.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to a static monthly calendar table and cannot provide overlapping-event columns in week view, separate all-day/timed layers, multi-day ranges, and stable timezone-aware date arithmetic. Toast UI Calendar supplies these capabilities directly from an events array.

data_in.note: events is passed unchanged to calendar.createEvents. start/end accept Date|string|number; JSON input should prefer timezone-qualified ISO-8601 strings. calendarId references options.calendars[].id.

events.id?: string -- optional by default; provide explicitly when later native API calls must locate the event
events.calendarId?: string -- default empty string; when provided, must match options.calendars[].id
events.color?: CSS color string -- defaults to the calendar text color
events.backgroundColor?: CSS color string -- defaults to the calendar background color
events.borderColor?: CSS color string -- defaults to the calendar border color

calendars?.name: string
calendars?.color?: CSS color string -- defaults to the theme text color
calendars?.backgroundColor?: CSS color string -- defaults to the theme background color
calendars?.borderColor?: CSS color string -- defaults to the theme border color

options?.week?: native Toast UI WeekOptions -- defaults to upstream week-view settings
options?.month?: native Toast UI MonthOptions -- defaults to upstream month-view settings
options?.theme?: native Toast UI theme object -- defaults to the built-in theme
options?.usageStatistics?: boolean -- boot forces false to avoid the analytics script

schema.initialDate?: ISO-8601 date/time string -- defaults to today

spec.note: The scrolling area and event-collision layout in month/week/day views depend on an explicit pixel height. boot defaults the container to 600px; call calendar.render() after size changes. Rule 3 forbids vh or percentage heights.

example._why: 日历事件的 category/all-day 分支、calendarId 引用与视图配置高歧义,minimal example 用原生 events/options 形状消歧。

uplink: display/local-interact 类,默认无需上行。若要把用户在日历内的变化交给宿主,由消费 AI 直接接 Toast UI 原生监听器并按载体处理;本条不规定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: conditional:须把 toastui-calendar.min.css 和挂载 Element 一并放进 shadowRoot;usageStatistics 强制 false,内部 Preact 树留在该容器
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 外部 CSS + DOM 几何布局,无 worker/wasm 或默认上行依赖

isolation.evidence: 唯一 body append 是 usageStatistics GA 元素(boot 以 usageStatistics:false 禁);日历 UI/弹层渲入传入容器;一个 window resize 监听(calendar.destroy 清理);CSS+挂载点须同落 shadow
